commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=55925509bffd8052030b11315d6541650b26c880)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a 48-model static and live OpenCode Zen catalog, dynamic resolution, family-specific transports, base URL normalization, manifest metadata, and focused tests.

PR surface: Source +1617, Tests +334. Total +1951 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level with high confidence: current main and v2026.6.6 expose the OpenCode Zen provider but lack catalog, augmentation, and dynamic-resolution hooks, matching the linked model-not-found path. This read-only review did not perform a credentialed failing request.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The blocking family-route defect has a narrow authoritative repair in the catalog and tests; contributor-supplied authenticated proof remains a separate merge gate after the code fix.

target.title: fix(opencode): restore Zen model catalog
target.body:
## Summary

- Restore a plugin-owned OpenCode Zen model catalog for the bundled `opencode` provider.
- Wire Zen catalog runtime hooks: durable static seed, live `/zen/v1/models` discovery, dynamic model resolution, model-catalog augmentation, and base URL normalization.
- Restore family-specific Zen transports so Claude/Minimax rows use Anthropic Messages on `/zen`, GPT rows use OpenAI Responses on `/zen/v1`, Gemini rows use the Google adapter, and fallback rows stay OpenAI-compatible.
- Broaden the durable fallback seed from the initial Claude subset to all 48 model IDs currently advertised by the public Zen model endpoint, so discovery outages do not make the current public catalog disappear.
- Add focused coverage for the 48-row durable fallback, static/live family transports, shared OpenCode auth handling, runtime discovery metadata, manifest transport metadata, and stale Zen base URL canonicalization.

Fixes #92479

## Real behavior proof

**Behavior addressed:** `opencode` no longer ships without catalog or dynamic-resolution hooks. A configured Zen model such as `opencode/claude-opus-4-8` resolves from the bundled durable seed, live discovery can synthesize newly advertised Zen rows from `https://opencode.ai/zen/v1/models`, Zen model rows keep their provider-family transport contract instead of being collapsed to `openai-completions`, and the durable fallback now covers all 48 model IDs returned by the public Zen model endpoint at proof time.

**Real environment tested:** Linux, Node 22.22.0, pnpm 11.2.2, local OpenClaw checkout at PR head `55925509`. Local proof used a dummy OpenCode env key for catalog fallback visibility, a public unauthenticated read of `https://opencode.ai/zen/v1/models` to verify the advertised model IDs, and mocked live discovery for live-only row synthesis; no real OpenCode credentials or live model requests were used.

**Exact steps or command run after this patch:**

```bash
python3 - <<'PY'
import json, urllib.request
req=urllib.request.Request('https://opencode.ai/zen/v1/models', headers={'User-Agent':'openclaw-pr-proof'})
with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=20) as r:
    data=json.load(r)
ids=[row['id'] for row in data.get('data', []) if isinstance(row, dict) and isinstance(row.get('id'), str)]
print(len(ids))
print('\n'.join(ids))
PY
git diff --check HEAD~1..HEAD
corepack pnpm@11.2.2 --dir . test extensions/opencode/index.test.ts
corepack pnpm@11.2.2 --dir . exec oxlint extensions/opencode/index.ts extensions/opencode/provider-catalog.ts extensions/opencode/index.test.ts
OPENCODE_API_KEY=dummy corepack pnpm@11.2.2 --dir . openclaw models list --provider opencode --json
corepack pnpm@11.2.2 --dir . plugins:inventory:check
```

**Evidence after fix:** Copied terminal output from the real OpenClaw CLI shows the bundled Zen provider returning 48 durable fallback rows after live discovery timed out locally. Focused runtime tests assert the transport metadata that the CLI table does not display: Claude and MiniMax rows use `anthropic-messages` with `https://opencode.ai/zen`, GPT rows use `openai-responses` with `https://opencode.ai/zen/v1`, Gemini rows use `google-generative-ai` with `https://opencode.ai/zen/v1`, and manifest/runtime catalog coverage both contain the same 48 IDs.

```text
$ python3 - <<'PY'
...
PY
48
claude-fable-5
claude-opus-4-8

gpt-5.4-pro
gpt-5.4-mini
gpt-5.4-nano
gpt-5.3-codex-spark
gpt-5.3-codex
gpt-5.2
gpt-5.2-codex
gpt-5.1
gpt-5.1-codex-max
gpt-5.1-codex
gpt-5.1-codex-mini
gpt-5
gpt-5-codex
gpt-5-nano
grok-build-0.1
deepseek-v4-pro
deepseek-v4-flash
glm-5.1
glm-5
minimax-m2.7
minimax-m2.5
kimi-k2.6
kimi-k2.5
qwen3.6-plus
qwen3.5-plus
big-pickle
deepseek-v4-flash-free
mimo-v2.5-free
qwen3.6-plus-free
minimax-m3-free
nemotron-3-ultra-free
north-mini-code-free

$ node scripts/run-node.mjs models list --provider opencode --json
[fetch-timeout] fetch timeout after 5000ms (elapsed 4998ms) operation=fetchWithSsrFGuard url=https://opencode.ai/zen/v1/models
{
  "count": 48,
  "models": [
    { "key": "opencode/big-pickle", "name": "Big Pickle", "input": "text+image", "contextWindow": 128000, "local": false, "available": true, "tags": [], "missing": false },
    { "key": "opencode/claude-opus-4-8", "name": "Claude Opus 4.8", "input": "text+image", "contextWindow": 200000, "local": false, "available": true, "tags": [], "missing": false },
    { "key": "opencode/deepseek-v4-pro", "name": "DeepSeek V4 Pro", "input": "text", "contextWindow": 1000000, "local": false, "available": true, "tags": [], "missing": false },
    { "key": "opencode/gemini-3.5-flash", "name": "Gemini 3.5 Flash", "input": "text+image", "contextWindow": 1048576, "local": false, "available": true, "tags": [], "missing": false },
    { "key": "opencode/gpt-5.5", "name": "GPT-5.5", "input": "text+image", "contextWindow": 400000, "local": false, "available": true, "tags": [], "missing": false },
    { "key": "opencode/minimax-m2.7", "name": "MiniMax M2.7", "input": "text", "contextWindow": 204800, "local": false, "available": true, "tags": [], "missing": false },
    { "key": "opencode/north-mini-code-free", "name": "North Mini Code Free", "input": "text+image", "contextWindow": 128000, "local": false, "available": true, "tags": [], "missing": false }
  ]
}

$ corepack pnpm@11.2.2 --dir . test extensions/opencode/index.test.ts
Test Files  1 passed (1)
Tests  10 passed (10)
[test] passed 1 Vitest shard in 28.11s

$ corepack pnpm@11.2.2 --dir . exec oxlint extensions/opencode/index.ts extensions/opencode/provider-catalog.ts extensions/opencode/index.test.ts
# no output

$ git diff --check
# no output

$ corepack pnpm@11.2.2 --dir . plugins:inventory:check
$ node scripts/generate-plugin-inventory-doc.mjs --check
```

**Observed result after fix:** The public Zen endpoint advertised 48 model IDs during proof, and `openclaw models list --provider opencode --json` shows 48 `opencode/*` rows from the durable fallback catalog when runtime discovery times out. Focused tests verify static seed resolution, cached live discovery, live-only row synthesis, shared OpenCode auth handling, runtime discovery metadata, manifest transport metadata, Claude Anthropic routing, MiniMax Anthropic routing, GPT Responses routing, Gemini routing, and stale Zen base URL canonicalization.

**What was not tested:** Real OpenCode credentials and live model completions were not run because this local environment has no `OPENCODE_API_KEY` / `OPENCODE_ZEN_API_KEY` configured. Full `pnpm build` was attempted earlier on this PR, but the `tsdown` phase was killed with SIGTERM after a long no-output period without a TypeScript diagnostic, so it is not claimed as passing here.
